content.title: Type 'AnalyticsCatalog' failed to compile
content.message: The node type 'Northwind/AnalyticsCatalog' was parked after a compile failure and will not be retried until its source is fixed. Failed to load assembly at /Users/roland/code/MeshWeaver/memex/Memex.Portal.Monolith/bin/Debug/net10.0/.mesh-cache/Northwind_AnalyticsCatalog_8ded364aefca4cc/Northwind_AnalyticsCatalog.dll — the build is not usable (corrupt cached .dll or a missing dependency).
